summary: Keep #45469 as the live canonical issue and repair the linked contributor PR #77961 rather than merge it now. Current main still has an unbounded reconnect scheduler in packages/gateway-client, while #77961 is useful but not merge-ready because it targets the legacy src/gateway surface, has failing proof/check gates, and lacks the required merge preflight.
